query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(startedAt, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN HOUR(startedAt) < 8 OR HOUR(startedAt) >= 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS after_hours,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(startedAt) IN (1,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weekend
FROM call_history
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(startedAt, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 6;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(startedAt, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN HOUR(startedAt) < 8 OR HOUR(startedAt) >= 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS after_hours,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(startedAt) IN (1,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS weekend
FROM call_history
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(startedAt, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 6;
